response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience and some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows), but lacks direct experience with GenAI-specific architectures like RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent systems. Her Python experience is not explicitly mentioned, and her cloud platform experience is limited to AWS in one role. Her background in AI-focused infrastructure and delivery to enterprise customers is also unclear.
strengths: Deep full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS, GCP/Azure not explicitly confirmed)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) in current role
Proven leadership in designing scalable systems and mentoring teams (e.g., refactoring dojos, TDD workshops)
concerns: Limited direct experience with GenAI core technologies (RAG, vector databases, LLM optimization) in resume
No explicit mention of Python in current roles (required skill)
Unclear track record in enterprise GenAI/cloud infrastructure delivery to customers
